headline: Is It Time To Reassess Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) After A 40% Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering if Fidelity National Information Services is attractively priced at its current level, or if the risks still outweigh the potential reward, starts with understanding what the recent share performance is really telling you. The stock has faced heavy pressure, with returns of a 5.7% decline over 7 days, a 3.9% decline over 30 days, a 30.3% decline year to date, and a 40.8% decline over the past year. These moves have put valuation front and center for many investors. They are...
